info.title: Electronic Document Orchestrator
info.description:
Sends and checks the status of electronic documents processed by your configured partner solution. This API has the following features:
- Access your application and request the status of a document.
- Access your application and send a document to be processed by your configured partner solution.
- Make requests to your configured partner service.
- Communicate with the *Brazil: Extension Fields for Cloud Requests* (NFE_CLOUD_REQ_EXT) BAdI.

x-sap-shortText: Enables you to send and check the status of electronic documents processed by your configured partner solution.

externalDocs.description: Partner Enablement for SAP Document and Reporting Compliance Outbound Invoicing Option for Brazil
